name: shirabe
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Shirabe instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Shirabe tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Shirabe through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Shirabe Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Shirabe only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
